message:
feat(mermaid): add timeline diagram support + restore journey layout (bd-hudcn.1.10.1)

- Add TimelineEvent AST type and parser (parse_timeline_line)
- Add timeline IR normalization (sections as clusters, periods as nodes)
- Add layout_timeline_diagram() with section-based vertical layout
- Add timeline_era_fill() for period node coloring
- Restore journey layout + score rendering (removed by concurrent commit)
- Fix stale journey_tasks field references across codebase
- Update compatibility matrix: timeline Unsupported -> Partial
- 3 timeline tests + 609 lib tests passing, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
